extraction.one_line_summary: VALVERDE Alejandro attacked under the red flag after MARTIN Dan's move, dropped him on the final climb to Ans for a solo victory.
tactical_patterns: Early 13-minute breakaway absorbed methodically; Movistar hunted from Bavo/Fermy Bear ascents, controlling until decisive climbs after La Redoute.
WELLENS Tim bridged solo from favorites group on Côte de la Roche-aux-Faucons, signaling insufficient firepower to wait for final climb.
FORMOLO Davide's attack under the red flag forced selection but tactical timing too early; MARTIN countered successfully before final gradient.

rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: positive: Fresher than MARTIN Dan on steepest final gradient to Ans despite matching earlier accelerations, indicates superior pacing discipline.
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: neutral: Strong enough to attack and briefly lead sub-1km but cracked when VALVERDE responded on steepest finishing ramp.
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: positive: Only non-GC rider to bridge from peloton to leaders on Roche-aux-Faucons, suggests underrated climbing capacity in Ardennes.
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: negative: Seventh at Flèche but only third here despite stronger podium expectations, struggled to follow winning accelerations.
